channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Using saliva to detect disease holds promise, but it's not perfected yet
item.description: Easier than a blood test, saliva tests have the potential to detect cavities, infections and even cancer. But a lack of insurance coverage and other o...

item.title: Trump says he doesn't know if aliens are real but directs government to release files on UFOs
item.description: President Donald Trump said Thursday that he's directing the Pentagon and other government agencies to release files related to extraterrestrials and ...

item.title: What worked and what didn't with a cellphone ban at a Kentucky school
item.description: Keeping students off their devices is the new norm in many schools. We talked to students and educators at one Kentucky school to see how it's working...

item.title: Scientists worry about lasting damage from Potomac sewage spill
item.description: Drinking water around the District of Columbia hasn't been contaminated. But scientists say the environmental damage could be severe.

item.title: Israeli settlers kill 19-year-old Palestinian American, officials and witnesses say
item.description: Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank shot and killed a Palestinian American man during an attack on a village, the Palestinian Health Ministry s...

item.title: Crews hope to resume recovery of 8 bodies from California avalanche after days of dangerous weather
Nvidia deepens early-stage push into India’s AI startup ecosystem
item.description: Nvidia is working with investors, nonprofits, and venture firms to build earlier ties with India's fast-growing AI founder ecosystem.

item.title: Ali Partovi’s Neo looks to upend the accelerator model with low-dilution terms
item.description: Neo's new Residency program invests $750,000 in an uncapped SAFE for startups and provides a $40,000 no-strings-attached grant for college students.

item.title: Google’s new Gemini Pro model has record benchmark scores — again
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro promises a Google LLM capable of handling more complex forms of work.

item.title: General Catalyst commits $5B to India over five years
item.description: The pledge marks a sharp jump from General Catalyst's earlier $500 million–$1 billion India earmark.

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
Off by Nearly 1 MILLION Jobs? Why New Jobs Report Will Impact Rentals
item.description: Big economic news dropped last week: labor data, inflation rates, and huge jobs revisions. All of these are already impacting the housing market, but ...

item.title: Israeli settlers kill 19-year-old Palestinian American, officials and witnesses say
item.description: The Palestinian Health Ministry and a witness say that Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank shot and killed a Palestinian American in an attack ...

item.title: FBI says ATM ‘jackpotting’ attacks are on the rise, and netting hackers millions in stolen cash
item.description: The FBI says hacks that trick ATMs into spitting out cash on demand are rising, with hundreds of attacks in the past year alone netting hackers millio...

item.title: The Housing For the 21st Century Act Brings Game Changers For Multifamily Investors
item.description: There’s nothing that unifies opposing political factions faster than seeing homeless encampments in American cities. That’s why the Housing for the 21...

item.title: Single-Family vs. Multifamily Rentals: Which Is the Best First Rental?
item.description: Single-family vs. multifamily rental properties—which gets you to financial freedom faster? A rookie real estate investor is wondering what he should ...

item.title: How the Wealthiest Have Programmed Their Portfolios This Year
item.description: Despite stock markets hovering around record highs, investors are feeling jittery. You can see it in consumer confidence collapsing to its lowest leve...

item.title: How to Buy Your First (or Next) Rental Property in 2026 (Step by Step)
item.description: Want to buy your first rental property in 2026? You’ve come to the right place! Whether you dream of becoming a “small and mighty” investor or buildin...
